project: Ink CLI Terminal Rendering Parity — Web-Derived Completion
description: Restore Web collapsed-output disclosure semantics in shared rows and add terminal-native Ink row expansion so previews stay dense while full input/output/error remains available.

userStories.title: Restore shared preview line limits without character truncation
userStories.description: As an SSH operator, I want large outputs to be summarized without losing visible line content.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared `previewLines` or successor logic limits collapsed output to five logical output lines for applicable row kinds
Exploration group collapsed child summaries are limited to six logical lines
Visible preview lines preserve full characters and rely on wrapping, not `… truncated`
Tests cover fewer-than-limit, exactly-at-limit, over-limit, empty-line, and long-unbroken-token cases

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
userStories.notes: 2026-05-17: PASS. Implemented shared Web-derived preview constants and explicit preview metadata in src/session-ui/terminalRows.ts. Collapsed previews remain bounded to 5 output lines for tool.call/tool.result/agent.async/yielded.run/execution.command/shell rows; exploration groups are now bounded to 6 child summaries. Existing preview logic still preserves full visible line text and uses +N omitted-line affordances rather than character truncation. Added focused tests for fewer-than-limit/empty, exactly-at-limit, over-limit, long-unbroken-token, and 8-item exploration group cases. Evidence tier: shared model + renderer-neutral fixture tests; no live/default PTY for this foundational story because PRD09 US-005 owns keyboard expansion PTY evidence. Commands in Docker worker: npm run build; node --test test/session-ui-terminal-rows.test.mjs test/terminal-parity-fixtures.test.mjs; npm run typecheck; npm run chat-ui:typecheck; npm test. Web UI preservation: shared src/session-ui change only; Web Compact Terminal visual code unchanged; npm run build included chat-ui:build, and fixture/source Web regression checks in terminal-parity-fixtures.test.mjs plus full npm test passed. Secret handling: no new unredacted fixture payloads or logs/artifacts added.

userStories.title: Expose omitted preview metadata and full detail payloads
userStories.description: As a renderer, I want explicit omitted-line metadata so I can show a detail affordance consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: CompactTerminalRow or detail descriptors expose omitted preview count or equivalent metadata for over-limit outputs
Full input/output/error payloads remain available on the row or detail items
Command/tool result conversion preserves full payloads while using bounded previews
Tests assert full detail payload survives collapsed preview rendering

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
userStories.notes: 2026-05-17: PASS. Added renderer-neutral CompactTerminalPreviewOmission metadata on rows and detail items, including source, visibleLineCount, omittedLineCount, totalLineCount, and maxVisibleLineCount. Long-output fixtures now assert omittedLineCount=7 for 12-line outputs and preserve the full row.output payload for details; exploration grouping keeps all detailItems while collapsing visible summaries to 6 and recording omitted details metadata. Evidence tier: shared model + fake deterministic fixtures; no PTY artifact because PRD09 US-005 owns default-path long-output expansion evidence. Commands in Docker worker: npm run build; node --test test/session-ui-terminal-rows.test.mjs test/terminal-parity-fixtures.test.mjs; npm run typecheck; npm run chat-ui:typecheck; npm test. Web UI preservation: no Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic changed; shared metadata is additive; chat-ui:build via npm run build, chat-ui:typecheck, and full npm test passed.

userStories.title: Add Ink selected-row and expanded-row controller behavior
userStories.description: As a keyboard user, I want to open details from the TUI without losing input flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Ink session state tracks selected row and expanded row IDs or an equivalent focused-detail mode
Keyboard controls select expandable rows and toggle details while preserving normal text entry and slash picker behavior
Help text documents the detail controls compactly
Controller tests cover selection, expansion, collapse, picker interaction, and message input interaction

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
userStories.notes: 2026-05-17: PASS. Added Ink selected-row state (`selectedRowId`) and expanded-row state (`expandedRowIds`) with normalization as rows change. Transcript Up/Down focus expandable rows when the composer is empty; Enter or `d` toggles details for the focused row while slash suggestions, pickers, and non-empty message input keep their existing behavior. Compact help now documents row focus and detail controls. Evidence tier: CLI controller/unit render tests plus deterministic PTY demo/default TUI path. Docker validation: npm run build; node --test test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs test/terminal-parity-fixtures.test.mjs; npm run typecheck. PTY check: npm run dev -- debug pty run --rows 36 --cols 120 --artifact --artifact-dir /tmp/pibo-pty-detail-us003-pass2 --wait-for 'select room' --press Enter --wait-for 'select session' --press Enter --wait-for 'd/enter details' --type d --wait-for Details --press CtrlC --expect Details --expect 'Opened row details' --reject detail-secret-value -- npm run dev -- tui:sessions --demo. Artifact path: /tmp/pibo-pty-detail-us003-pass2. Classification: deterministic fake/demo source through real Ink TUI path, not live provider. Web preservation: no Web Compact Terminal or src/session-ui production code changed; build/typecheck included Web gates. Full regression: npm test passed in Docker worker (745 tests).

userStories.title: Render Ink details below the parent row
userStories.description: As an SSH operator, I want full details inline where the event occurred.
acceptanceCriteria: Expanded Ink row renders `Input`, `Output`, `Error`, linked session, and compacted-output disclosure below the parent row
Details use compact terminal spacing and semantic markers rather than detached header messages
Details redact secrets and preserve full multi-line output
Ink snapshots cover string, JSON, error, linked session, and compacted-output details

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
userStories.notes: 2026-05-17: PASS. InkTerminalView now passes selected/expanded row state to InkTerminalRow. Collapsed rows keep bounded previews and show only a selected detail affordance; expanded rows render compact inline details below the parent row with `Details`, `Input`, `Output`, `Error`, linked session, and preview-omission line-count disclosure where present. Detail values preserve full multi-line string output and redact secrets before rendering; object/array values stay bounded through the existing terminal JSON formatter pending PRD11 detail JSON wells. Evidence tier: Ink renderer snapshots with deterministic expandable-detail fixture plus real Ink TUI demo PTY path. Docker validation: npm run build; node --test test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs test/terminal-parity-fixtures.test.mjs; npm run typecheck. PTY artifact path: /tmp/pibo-pty-detail-us003-pass2 showed collapsed `details available` then expanded `Details`/`Output` below the row and rejected `detail-secret-value`. Classification: deterministic fake/demo source through real TUI path, not live provider. Web preservation: no Web Compact Terminal or shared session-ui production code changed; build/typecheck included Web gates. Full regression: npm test passed in Docker worker (745 tests).

userStories.title: Validate long-output preview and expansion through PTY
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want actual terminal evidence that collapsed output and details behave like Web.
acceptanceCriteria: PTY scenario creates or renders a row with at least 12 output lines
Collapsed screen shows five preview lines and an omitted/detail affordance
After keyboard expansion, screen/artifact shows full output or full-output disclosure
Artifacts include raw ANSI, clean text, final screen, metadata, input/assertions, and exact command invocation

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
userStories.notes: 2026-05-17: PASS. Added a deterministic long-output row to the real `pibo tui:sessions --demo` default-path fixture (12 logical output lines, secret-bearing input) so PTY validation exercises the actual Ink app instead of a renderer-only script. Collapsed TUI output shows line 05 plus `+7 more lines` and `details available`, rejects line 06 and the long-output secret; expanded TUI output opened with `d` shows `Details`, `7 hidden while collapsed`, and line 12 while still rejecting the secret. Artifact paths in Docker worker: /tmp/pibo-pty-long-output-us005-collapsed and /tmp/pibo-pty-long-output-us005-expanded, each containing raw.ansi.log, clean.txt, screen.txt, events.jsonl, input.json, metadata.json, and assertions.json. Commands run in Docker: npm run build; node --test test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs test/terminal-parity-fixtures.test.mjs test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs test/cli-session-source.test.mjs test/ink-cli-terminal-rendering-parity-final.test.mjs test/ink-cli-v2-pty-smoke.test.mjs; npm run typecheck; npm test; PTY collapsed and expanded commands recorded in IMPLEMENTATION_PROGRESS.md. Evidence tier: deterministic fake/demo source through the real Ink TUI PTY path, not live provider. Web preservation: no Web Compact Terminal or src/session-ui production code changed.
